positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a constellation embracing a crescent moon and a single, abstracted forest animal silhouette, such as a fox or a deer. The style should be highly detailed line art combined with negative space and flat, vibrant color fields (deep indigo, burnt orange, teal). The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for apparel printing. Use a woodcut or Nordic folklore aesthetic. Dramatic, even studio lighting emphasizing clean edges and bold contrast. Vector art quality, high contrast, intricate linework, ready for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, logo, typography, poor anatomy, messy edges, grayscale, realistic, low contrast, out of frame, noise
